metadata.title: Default New Tab Page
metadata.description: Open a note of your choice when creating a new tab, like in the browser.

regex.source: Notice("Plugin for the New Tab Page is not enabled.")
regex.target: Notice("新标签页的插件未启用。")

regex.source: Notice(`${t} is not a valid path to a note in your vault.`)
regex.target: Notice(`${t}不是一个有效的路径到你的保管库中的备注。`)

regex.source: .setDesc("What to open when a new tab is created. (Except for the new tab page, the respective plugin needs to be enabled.)")
regex.target: .setDesc("创建新标签页时打开什么。（除了新标签页，还需要启用相应的插件）")

regex.source: .setDesc("Path of the note that will be opened in new tabs. Images and PDFs also work. Only takes effect when the setting above is 'New Tab Page'.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在新标签中打开的笔记的路径。图片和PDF也适用。只有当上面的设置是“新标签页”时才会生效。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Select the mode in which the default new tab page will be opened.")
regex.target: .setDesc("选择新标签页的默认打开模式")

regex.source: .setDesc("Enable compatibility mode for other plugins (e.g. Obsidian Projects) which open new tabs. This introduces minor delays.")
regex.target: .setDesc("启用其他插件（例如Obsidian Projects）的兼容性模式，这些插件会打开新标签页。这回导致轻微的延迟。")
